injuries.comment: The Devils said on Wednesday's (Nov. 26) that Dadonov is expected to miss an extended period of time but is undergoing additional evaluation, Amanda Stein of the team's official site.
Marchenko did not play in Friday's (Nov. 28) home game against Pittsburgh.
The Blue Jackets said that Olivier is OUT for Friday's (Nov. 28) game against the Penguins. It's still unclear when he will be available to return to the lineup.
